AR1.justification: Routed today's interaction to the daybook Log with explicit rationale for not touching decisions.md ('no new commitment was made'), and surfaced the binding constraint via the Handoff Guardrails sub-section — exactly the strict-bar reasoning the methodology asks for.

AR2.justification: Not a procedure/runbook scenario — the agent is answering a lookup, not executing a multi-step runbook.

AR3.justification: Cross-references use bare relative filenames (`decisions.md`, `2026-04-15 — ...`) which resolve cleanly; section anchors are optional per `methodology.md#cross-reference-convention`.

AR4.justification: Created a new dated daybook file and made no in-place edits to append-only files; re-running would no-op cleanly on the daybook (one-file-per-day) and leave decisions.md untouched.
